requestment_date.text: วันที่ขอกู้

root.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_loan_request.req_contract_period as req_contract_period, sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no) as memname, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.position_code , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_a.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_a.member_group_control, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_b.member_group_name as member_group_con_name , sc_lon_m_loan_request.salary_amount, sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_share_value, sc_lon_m_loan_request.mem_request_amount, sc_lon_m_loan_request.remark, sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_old_loan, sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_oldint, sc_lon_m_loan_request.buy_share, sc_lon_m_loan_request.bank_acc_no, sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.shareloan_code, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.debtor_code, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.other_code, sc_lon_m_loan_request.flag_status, sc_lon_m_loan_request.max_loan_permit as max_loan_permit, sc_lon_m_loan_request.interest_first, sc_lon_m_loan_request.period_payment_amount, sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_installment_amount, sc_lon_m_loan_request.salary_net_req, sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_objective_code, sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_request_amount as loan_request_amount, coalesce(( select sum( item_amount ) from sc_lon_m_req_salnet_inc where item_code = '11' and sc_lon_m_req_salnet_inc.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ),0) as academic_amount, coalesce(( select sum( item_amount ) from sc_lon_m_req_salnet_inc where item_code = '12' and sc_lon_m_req_salnet_inc.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ),0) as remuneration_amount, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.grade, coalesce(sc_lon_m_loan_request.balance_salary,0) as balance_salary, PKA_LON_REQSRV.fp_calc_agetext_m_age( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , sc_lon_m_loan_request.begining_of_contract ) as age_mem_text, mem_request_amount - total_old_loan - total_oldint - fee_amount - buy_share as paid_amount /*รับจริง*/ FROM sc_lon_m_loan_request, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_a, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_b, sc_lon_m_rule WHERE ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_a.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_a.member_group_control = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_b.member_group_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type = 'ส' ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.cancel_status = '0') /*WHERE*/ -- and ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date = to_date('18/02/2022' ,'dd/mm/yyyy' )) -- and ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no = '007405')

r_amn_loan_req_nest.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_loan_history.principal_of_loan, sc_lon_m_loan_history.interest_amount, sc_lon_m_loan_history.last_period, sc_lon_m_loan_history.principal_balance_of_loan FROM sc_lon_m_loan_history where sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_requestment_no = {0}

r_amn_loan_req_nest_1.sql: select sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no, sc_lon_m_ucf_fee.fee_name, sc_lon_m_req_fee.amount, sc_lon_m_req_fee.prakan_atm from sc_lon_m_req_fee, sc_lon_m_loan_request, sc_lon_m_ucf_fee where sc_lon_m_req_fee.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_ucf_fee.fee_type = sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = {0}
